label: M1 full CFD segment heat ledger, pressure-root mdot
runtime_input_policy: CFD realized heat fluxes consumed as diagnostic upper-bound inputs; CFD mdot joined only after solve.

label: M1b full CFD segment heat ledger, fixed CFD mdot
runtime_input_policy: CFD mdot and realized heat fluxes consumed; thermal diagnostic only.

label: M2 CFD heater + test-section net + cooler, pressure-root mdot

label: M3 CFD heater + cooler only, pressure-root mdot
